title: Dashboard shows all primary KPI cards and lists for an authenticated user
description: Verifies the dashboard loads after login and displays all key stat cards plus low stock and recent movements sections.

steps.description: Verify text "Recent Stock Movements" is visible

title: Dashboard Total Items count card is visible and labeled correctly
description: Verifies the Total Items KPI card appears on the dashboard for an authenticated user.

title: Dashboard Low Stock count card is visible and labeled correctly
description: Verifies the Low Stock KPI card appears on the dashboard for an authenticated user.

title: Dashboard Active Work Orders count card is visible
description: Verifies the Active Work Orders KPI card appears on the dashboard for an authenticated user.

steps.description: Verify text "Active Work Orders" is visible

title: Dashboard Low Stock alert list section is visible
description: Verifies the Low Stock Alerts list section is present and visible on the dashboard.

steps.description: Verify text "Low Stock Alerts" is visible
Verify element "Low stock alerts list" is visible

title: Dashboard Recent Stock Movements list section is visible
description: Verifies the Recent Stock Movements list section is present and visible on the dashboard.

steps.description: Verify text "Recent Stock Movements" is visible
Verify element "Recent stock movements list" is visible

title: Create a new category successfully from Categories list
description: Verifies an authenticated user can create a new category and see it appear in the categories table.

steps.description: Type "E2E Category A" into the "Name" field
Type "Category created by automated UI test" into the "Description" field
Verify text "E2E Category A" is visible

title: Duplicate category name shows validation error on create
description: Verifies the create category form blocks duplicate names and displays a visible validation error message.

steps.description: Type "E2E Category Duplicate" into the "Name" field
Type "E2E Category Duplicate" into the "Name" field
Verify text "already been taken" is visible

title: Create category requires name field (required validation)
description: Verifies the create category form enforces required name input and shows a visible error when empty.

title: Cancel out of create category returns to list without creating
description: Verifies a user can exit the create form using the cancel/back action and returns to categories list.

title: Edit category enforces required name when cleared
description: Verifies the edit category form blocks saving when the name is cleared and shows a visible validation error.

steps.description: Type "E2E Category Required Check" into the "Name" field
Click "Edit" on the row for category "E2E Category Required Check"

title: Categories list page loads and shows core UI elements
description: Verifies the categories index page is reachable after login and displays expected list controls.

steps.description: Verify element "Tambah Kategori button" is visible

title: Search items by code or name from Items list
description: Verifies that the Items list supports searching by item code or name and displays matching results.

steps.description: Type "Test" into the item search field

title: Filter items by category from Items list
description: Verifies that selecting a category filter narrows the Items list to that category.

title: Filter items by Active status from Items list
description: Verifies that the status filter can be set to Active and the list remains usable with results displayed.

title: Filter items by Inactive status from Items list
description: Verifies that the status filter can be set to Inactive and the list updates accordingly (including empty state if no results).

title: Low stock badge visibility on Items list
description: Verifies that items below minimum stock show a visible low stock indicator/badge on the Items list when present.

steps.description: Verify element "Low stock badge/indicator" is visible

title: Open Create Item form from Items list
description: Verifies that the user can access the Create Item page from the Items list using the Tambah Item action.

title: Create a new supplier successfully and confirm it appears in the suppliers list
description: Verifies an admin user can create a supplier via the create form and then see it listed on the suppliers index page.

title: Submit supplier create form with valid data and return to list
description: Verifies the supplier create form accepts valid inputs and returns the user to the suppliers list page after saving.

title: Create supplier with required fields and verify the new supplier is visible in the list
description: Verifies saving a supplier with required fields results in the new supplier name appearing on the suppliers list page.

steps.description: Type "Supplier E2E Test A" into the "Name" field

title: Finish supplier creation and verify success state on suppliers list
description: Verifies the create supplier workflow completes, shows a visible success indication, and the created supplier is present on the list.

steps.description: Type "Supplier E2E Test B" into the "Name" field

title: Open supplier detail page from suppliers list and verify detail sections are visible
description: Verifies a user can open a supplier detail page from the list and see supplier details and the recent purchase orders section.

steps.description: Click the first supplier in the suppliers table/list
Verify text "Recent Purchase Orders" is visible

title: Supplier detail shows an empty-state when there are no recent purchase orders
description: Verifies the supplier detail page shows a visible empty-state message/indicator when the supplier has no recent purchase orders.

steps.description: Click a supplier that appears to have no purchase orders (no PO rows shown in list preview, if present)
Verify text "Recent Purchase Orders" is visible
Verify text "No purchase orders" is visible

title: Create supplier with invalid contact format and verify validation error is shown
description: Verifies the create supplier form rejects an invalid contact format and displays a visible validation error without leaving the form.

steps.description: Type "Supplier Invalid Contact" into the "Name" field

title: Submit invalid contact and remain on create page with validation message
description: Verifies submitting the supplier form with an invalid contact keeps the user on the create page and shows an error message.

steps.description: Type "Supplier Invalid Contact 2" into the "Name" field

title: Suppliers list page renders and shows expected page heading/table
description: Verifies the suppliers index page loads successfully for an authenticated user and displays key UI elements for the list.

title: Create a new warehouse and verify it appears in the warehouse list
description: Verifies an authenticated user can create a warehouse with name and location and then see it in the warehouses list.

title: Submit warehouse create form with valid name and location
description: Verifies the warehouse creation form accepts valid inputs and shows success result (redirect or confirmation).

title: Complete warehouse creation end-to-end (fill fields, submit, verify in list)
description: Verifies creating a warehouse end-to-end including form submission and confirming the new warehouse is visible in the list.

steps.description: Type "Warehouse QA Auto 01" into the "Name" field
Type "Location QA Auto" into the "Location" field
Verify text "Warehouse QA Auto 01" is visible

title: Open a warehouse detail page and verify stock table is visible
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open a warehouse details page and see the stock table section.

steps.description: Click the first warehouse row/name in the warehouses list

title: Create Transfer stock movement successfully and view detail
description: Verifies a user can create a Transfer movement with required fields and then see the generated reference on the detail page.

steps.description: Click on the "Stock Movements" navigation link
Click the "Create" or "New Stock Movement" button/link

title: Transfer form shows both Source and Destination warehouse fields after selecting type
description: Verifies the Transfer movement type dynamically reveals both source and destination warehouse fields.

steps.description: Click on the "Stock Movements" navigation link
Click the "Create" or "New Stock Movement" button/link
Select "Transfer" from the movement type dropdown

title: Prevent Transfer submission when Source warehouse is missing
description: Verifies validation prevents saving a Transfer when required Source warehouse is not provided.

steps.description: Click on the "Stock Movements" navigation link
Click the "Create" or "New Stock Movement" button/link
Select "Transfer" from the movement type dropdown

title: Prevent Transfer submission when Destination warehouse is missing
description: Verifies validation prevents saving a Transfer when required Destination warehouse is not provided.

steps.description: Click on the "Stock Movements" navigation link
Click the "Create" or "New Stock Movement" button/link
Select "Transfer" from the movement type dropdown

title: Create Material Issue with quantity greater than available stock shows insufficient stock error
description: Verifies Material Issue submission fails with a visible insufficient stock error when quantity exceeds available stock.

steps.description: Click on the "Stock Movements" navigation link
Click the "Create" or "New Stock Movement" button/link
Select "Material Issue" from the movement type dropdown

title: Material Issue form hides Destination warehouse field (only Source required)
description: Verifies selecting Material Issue dynamically shows Source warehouse and does not require/show Destination warehouse.

steps.description: Click on the "Stock Movements" navigation link
Click the "Create" or "New Stock Movement" button/link
Select "Material Issue" from the movement type dropdown

title: Prevent submission when quantity is empty or zero
description: Verifies the form blocks saving a movement when quantity is not provided or is zero.

steps.description: Click on the "Stock Movements" navigation link
Click the "Create" or "New Stock Movement" button/link
Select "Transfer" from the movement type dropdown

title: View Stock Movement detail shows reference number and key fields
description: Verifies a user can open a movement from the list and see a visible reference number and movement details on the detail page.

steps.description: Click on the "Stock Movements" navigation link
Click on the first stock movement row in the list to open its detail

title: Create a new Purchase Order with dynamic line items and approve it
description: Verifies a user can create a draft PO with multiple lines, see calculated totals, then approve it from the PO detail page.

steps.description: Click the "Create" or "New Purchase Order" button

title: Create PO: add two line items and verify subtotal and grand total are visible before submit
description: Verifies real-time calculation UI is shown for line subtotals and grand total when quantities and unit prices are entered.

steps.description: Click the "Create" or "New Purchase Order" button
Select an option from the "Supplier" dropdown

title: Create PO successfully and verify it appears as Draft in detail/status badge
description: Verifies submitting the create form results in a PO detail page showing a Draft status badge.

steps.description: Click the "Create" or "New Purchase Order" button
Click the "Save" or "Create Purchase Order" button

title: Approve a Draft PO from PO detail page
description: Verifies clicking Approve changes the PO status from Draft to Approved on the detail page.

steps.description: Click the first PO row in the list to open its detail page

title: Create a new Work Order (WO) with input materials and output products
description: Verifies an admin can create a production order by filling header fields and adding at least one input and one output line, then sees the WO detail page.

steps.description: Click the "Create" or "New Production Order" button

title: Create WO end-to-end: add input row and output row then submit
description: Verifies the create WO form supports dynamically adding rows and successfully submits to create a new WO.

steps.description: Click the "Create" or "New Production Order" button
Type "WO UI Test" into the Description field

title: Remove dynamically added input and output rows before submitting
description: Verifies the user can add and remove material/product rows on the create WO form without errors or broken UI.

steps.description: Click the "Create" or "New Production Order" button
Click the "Remove" button for the newly added input material row

title: Create WO with missing required fields shows validation errors
description: Verifies required field validation prevents WO creation and displays visible error feedback.

steps.description: Click the "Create" or "New Production Order" button
Click the "Save" or "Create" button on the form

title: View Production Orders list and open an existing WO detail
description: Verifies the production order list page loads and a user can open a WO detail to see status information.

steps.description: Click the first available "View" or WO row in the list

title: Start production on a WO and see status change to In Progress
description: Verifies starting production from the WO detail page updates the visible status and disables/replaces the Start action appropriately.

steps.description: Click the first available "View" or WO row in the list

title: Complete production on an In Progress WO and see status change to Completed
description: Verifies completing production from the WO detail page updates the visible status to Completed.

steps.description: Click the first available "View" or WO row in the list

title: Cancel a WO with confirmation
description: Verifies canceling a work order prompts for confirmation and results in a visible canceled status.

steps.description: Click the first available "View" or WO row in the list
Click the "Confirm" button in the cancel confirmation

title: Prevent starting production when materials are insufficient (error shown)
description: Verifies the system blocks starting production when required input materials are not available and shows an insufficient stock message.

steps.description: Click the first available "View" or WO row in the list that shows status "Draft" or shows a "Start Production" button

title: Create stock opname session and verify items with system quantities are loaded
description: Ensures a new stock opname session can be created and the item list with system quantities is displayed.

steps.description: Click the "Stock Opnames" navigation link/menu item
Click the "Create Stock Opname" or "Create" button
Verify text "Create Stock Opname" is visible
Verify the warehouse selection field is visible

title: Save physical counts and verify differences are displayed
description: Verifies physical counts can be entered and saved, and the differences (system vs physical) are shown afterward.

steps.description: Click the "Stock Opnames" navigation link/menu item
Click the first available opname session in the list to open its details
Type "10" into the first item "Physical Count" input field

title: Complete opname after saving counts and verify status becomes completed
description: Ensures an opname can be completed after counts are saved, and the UI reflects completed status.

steps.description: Click the "Stock Opnames" navigation link/menu item
Click the first available opname session in the list to open its details
Type "10" into the first item "Physical Count" input field

title: Prevent completion when no physical counts have been saved
description: Validates that the system blocks completing an opname if the user has not saved any physical counts.

steps.description: Click the "Stock Opnames" navigation link/menu item
Click the first available opname session in the list to open its details
Verify text "Please save physical counts" is visible

title: Cancel an opname session and verify it is marked canceled
description: Ensures an in-progress opname session can be canceled and the UI indicates the canceled state.

steps.description: Click the "Stock Opnames" navigation link/menu item
Click the first available opname session in the list to open its details

title: Create new opname with required fields validation
description: Verifies the create form requires warehouse and date before a session can be created.

steps.description: Click the "Stock Opnames" navigation link/menu item
Click the "Create Stock Opname" or "Create" button
Click the "Create" or "Save" button on the form
Verify text "Warehouse is required" is visible

title: Stock Summary report loads and shows aggregated stock table
description: Verifies the Stock Summary report page is accessible after login and displays an aggregated stock view.

steps.description: Click on the "Stock Summary" report link in the Reports navigation

title: Stock Summary report: filter by warehouse updates results view
description: Verifies filtering Stock Summary by a warehouse refreshes the visible results in the report table.

steps.description: Click on the "Stock Summary" report link in the Reports navigation
Select a specific warehouse (not "All") from the Warehouse dropdown

title: Low Stock report loads and shows low-stock listing
description: Verifies the Low Stock report page displays low stock items and includes deficit-related information.

steps.description: Click on the "Low Stock" report link in the Reports navigation

title: Low Stock report: warehouse filter scopes the results
description: Verifies selecting a warehouse on Low Stock report scopes the visible list to that warehouse context.

steps.description: Click on the "Low Stock" report link in the Reports navigation
Select a specific warehouse (not "All") from the Warehouse dropdown

title: Movement History report loads and shows filter controls
description: Verifies the Movement History report page is accessible and displays filters for item, type, and date range.

steps.description: Click on the "Movement History" report link in the Reports navigation

title: Movement History report: invalid date range shows validation error
description: Verifies the report blocks filtering when the end date is before the start date and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Click on the "Movement History" report link in the Reports navigation
Type a start date that is later (e.g., "2026-02-20") into the Start Date field
Type an end date that is earlier (e.g., "2026-02-10") into the End Date field
Verify text "End date must be after start date" is visible

title: Create a new user with role and active status (admin)
description: Verifies an admin can create a user and see it appear in the user list with role/active indicators.

title: Create user form validation when submitted empty (admin)
description: Verifies required-field validation messages appear when an admin submits the create user form without filling inputs.

title: Create user fails with invalid email format (admin)
description: Verifies the create user form blocks submission and shows validation when email format is invalid.

steps.description: Type "Test User Invalid Email" into the name field

title: Edit an existing user and update role (admin)
description: Verifies an admin can open edit user screen, change role, and see updated role in the list.

steps.description: Click the "Edit" button for the first user in the list

title: Delete a user (admin) with confirmation
description: Verifies an admin can delete a user from the list after confirming the deletion.

steps.description: Click the "Delete" button for a user that is not the currently logged-in account
Click the "Confirm" button in the deletion confirmation

title: Prevent deleting own account (admin safeguard)
description: Verifies the system blocks an admin from deleting their own account and shows an error message.

steps.description: Click the "Delete" button for the user row matching the currently logged-in email

title: User list shows role badges and active status indicators
description: Verifies the user list displays role badges and an active/inactive status indicator for users.

title: Non-admin cannot access Users page (403)
description: Verifies a non-admin user is forbidden from accessing the admin-only Users page.
